title: Create : Factory Processing
description:
Additing just Light blocks and glasses with some extra 
[Noted: Some of them can be seen in some of other creator since some of them doesn't have neoforged version]
body:
🌟 Just A Simple Create Recipes: Lights & Glasses

This mod was made as a fun addition for my own Let’s Play world, but I figured others might enjoy it too! Don’t expect anything too complex — it’s just some simple, quality-of-life recipes centered around light blocks and glass variations, with a little Create flavor sprinkled in.

✨ Features:

🪟 Custom Glass & Light Blocks to brighten up your builds.

⚙️ Sequenced Assembly Recipes for certain items, designed to integrate with Create’s production system. (JEI recommended for recipe viewing)

🧪 Some recipes may feel a little “cheaty” — but hey, it’s all about having fun!

⚠️ Notes:

This is my first mod, so expect it to be lightweight and straightforward.

I can’t promise updates for future Minecraft versions, but feel free to enjoy it as-is.

Use it however you like — it was made for personal gameplay, but you’re welcome to include it in your worlds.

If you’re looking for a casual add-on that gives Create some extra utility with light and glass crafting, this might be just what you need!
